examples: She looked up at him with beseeching eyes.
Trample not upon thy beseeching worms, O noble Majesty!
"I need to know you do believe me," she says, her eyes beseeching.
On Twitter, some Texas and Oklahoma residents were beseeching followers to do a rain dance for the parched states.
As we flew over a thunderstorm near Omaha we heard airline pilots on the radio beseeching air traffic controllers for higher altitudes.
